essays:
```latex
\text{MATRIX MULTIPLICATION:} \\
\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} 5 & 6 \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} 6 & 8 \end{bmatrix} \\
\begin{bmatrix} 3 & 4 \end{bmatrix} \times \begin{bmatrix} 7 & 8 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 10 & 12 \end{bmatrix} \\
\text{I LINED THE TWO MATRICES UP AND ADDED THE NUMBERS THAT ARE IN THE SAME} \\
\text{SPOT, SO } 1+5=6, 2+6=8, 3+7=10, 4+8=12
```

$$\text{CONVOLUTION (FILTER APPLIED TO IMAGE PATCH):}$$
$$[1 \ 0] \ [4 \ 5]$$
$$[0 \ -1] * [6 \ 7] = -3$$
$$\text{EACH FILTER VALUE MULTIPLIES THE NUMBER UNDER IT AND THEN I ADD ALL}$$
$$\text{FOUR RESULTS TOGETHER: } 1*4 + 0*5 + 0*6 + -1*7 = -3.$$

```latex
\begin{verbatim}
DEF MULTIPLICATION_TABLE(N):
    TABLE = []
    FOR I IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
        ROW = []
        FOR J IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
            ROW.APPEND(I * J)
\end{verbatim}
```
